formDescription: Step 3 - Technical Information - Government and First Nation Fee Exemption Request

V1IsEligibleForFeeExemption.title: Do you belong to, are you applying on behalf of, or are you an eligible government or First Nation entity for fee exemption?
V1IsEligibleForFeeExemption.description: if applying on behalf of  OR part of a provincial government ministry OR applying for the Government of Canada OR A First Nation for water use on reserve land OR A person applying to use water on Treaty Lands OR A Nisga'a citizen OR An entity applying to use water from the Nisga'a Water Reservation

V1IsExistingExemptClient.title: Are you an existing exempt client?

enum: First Nations/Indian Band for use on Reserve
Acting on behalf of a BC provincial ministry with a letter of permission from that ministry
V1FeeExemptionCategory.title: Fee Exemption Category:
V1FeeExemptionCategory.description: Fee exempt category as per the applicant's situation -  First nation or BC Government ministry or Federal Government or Indian band

V1FeeExemptionSupportingInfo.title: Supporting Information
V1FeeExemptionSupportingInfo.description: Please enter any supporting information that will assist in determining your eligibility for a fee exemption. Please refer to help for details on fee exemption criteria and requirements.
